message:
feat(vdbe): add Integer/Goto/Null to hot-path opcode dispatch and update .gitignore for ephemeral artifacts

Add the three most frequently executed opcodes (Integer, Goto, Null) to
the fast-path match in VdbeEngine, avoiding the 190-arm fallback match
and improving branch prediction for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE programs.

Also add .gitignore patterns for recurring ephemeral files:
- .ntm/ (NTM agent session directories)
- /[0-9]* (benchmark timing/row-count output at repo root)
- /test (bare test binary at repo root)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -254,3 +254,12 @@ __PATCHSET__
 /D[0-9]*
 db300_*.toml
 librust_out.rlib
+
+# NTM agent session directories
+.ntm/
+
+# Benchmark/test numeric output at repo root (timing values, row counts, etc.)
+/[0-9]*
+
+# Bare test binary at repo root
+/test
